summary: All three requirements appear to be implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is addressed in BookingRequestModal.tsx with queryClient.invalidateQueries for 'guestBookings'. REQ-2 is addressed in OrganizerDashboard.tsx with inline OrganizerBookingList import and rendering. REQ-3 is addressed in OrganizerCard.tsx with explicit 'bg-navy-900 text-white' classes on the Book Now button. All fixes are consistent with the navy/gold theme in tailwind.config.js.
